# SqueezeOS x402 Gateway — agent is the business
> Your AI agent is a business. It just doesn't have a bank account.

MCP tools (only 3):
- collect_payment — agent wallet pays; no human merchant account
- prove_creditworthiness — will this bot pay?
- generate_compliance_log — HMAC audit trail for SDVOSB/gov/enterprise

npm: npx @scriptmasterlabs/agent-wallet
Landing: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/agent-wallet
SDVOSB UEI G24VZA4RLMK3 CAGE 21U51
Remote optional: https://mcp-x402.onrender.com/mcp
